purpose: Test whether actual top-of-book state and aggressive trade flow contain executable short-horizon alpha after actual spread, conservative latency, taker fees, impact, funding, and a global single-position constraint.

source.integrity: Every ZIP must match the adjacent official .CHECKSUM SHA-256. Any missing, conflicting, nonmonotone, or malformed interval is unavailable and never imputed.

calendar_sampling.rule: For each UTC calendar month, select day = 1 + uint64_be(SHA256(seed + colon + YYYY-MM)[0:8]) mod days_in_month. Crypto trades seven days a week, so no weekday adjustment.

causal_data_contract.signal_clock: UTC 1-second buckets. A feature for second t uses only exchange events with event timestamp <= the end of t.
causal_data_contract.entry_quote: First valid bookTicker observation at or after decision_time + latency; LONG crosses ask and SHORT crosses bid.
causal_data_contract.exit_quote: First valid bookTicker observation at or after the exit decision; LONG exits at bid and SHORT exits at ask.
causal_data_contract.same_timestamp_rule: bookTicker and aggTrades do not receive a favorable within-timestamp ordering. Signals use the previous completed second; execution starts after latency.
causal_data_contract.missing_rule: No forward/back fill across missing seconds for signal generation. A signal requires a fresh quote and trade-flow observation under the family-specific staleness cap.
causal_data_contract.global_slot: Across BTCUSDT and ETHUSDT, pending entry plus open position count is at most one.

features.normalization: All rolling statistics exclude the current second and require a fixed minimum history. No full-sample scaling.

strategy_families.OFI_TRADE_CONTINUATION: Same-sign extreme top-of-book OFI and aggressive-trade imbalance predict continuation.
strategy_families.QUEUE_DEPLETION_CONTINUATION: One-side quote depletion plus same-direction aggressive flow predicts the next price change.
strategy_families.ABSORPTION_REVERSAL: Extreme aggressive flow with weak same-direction mid response signals passive absorption and a fade.
strategy_families.IMBALANCE_FLIP_AFTER_SWEEP: An extreme queue imbalance reverses after a one-sided mid move and spread normalization.
strategy_families.SPREAD_SHOCK_REVERSION: Transient spread expansion with exhausted signed flow reverts after spread compression.
strategy_families.CROSS_ASSET_PRESSURE_TRANSFER: Lagged BTC/ETH order-flow pressure predicts the other asset only when its own book has not yet repriced.

registered_search_grid.selection_rule: Economic-family grids are evaluated completely. Parameter neighborhoods, not isolated maxima, must support a candidate.

execution_cost_contract.spread: Actual observed bid/ask at entry and exit, never a fixed synthetic spread.
execution_cost_contract.impact_base: Additional adverse impact based on order notional / observed top-quote notional, floored at 0.25 bp.
execution_cost_contract.impact_stress: Double base impact and cap position to the stricter top-quote participation constraint.
execution_cost_contract.funding: Official realized funding charged/credited only if a position crosses a funding timestamp.
execution_cost_contract.position_sizing: Research alpha is first evaluated at low risk. Cash risk 0.10% per trade, gross notional cap 2x equity, and order quantity cap 5% of displayed top-quote quantity; no leverage tuning to rescue negative expectancy.
execution_cost_contract.maker_orders: Not part of Wave8 v1. Maker logic may be opened only after a taker-executable family is positive or a separately registered queue model exists.

gates.walkforward_rule: Only a frozen candidate that passes the complete calibration and internal-test gates may cause the locked 2024-01 through 2025-07 validation dates to be downloaded.

promotion: A passing Wave8 candidate remains research-only. It must still pass full multi-period walk-forward, actual funding, latency/fee/impact stresses, capacity, concentration, liquidation risk, independent audit, code reproduction, and finally one sealed OOS evaluation.
